panels.title: Cycle Time: Ready For Testing → Done (hours)
panels.description: Average, median and 85th percentile cycle time per week. Lower and stable p85 indicates a predictable flow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', resolved_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Median", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.85) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "p85" FROM v_cycle_time_rft_to_done WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Weekly Throughput (Issues Completed)
panels.description: Number of issues reaching Done per week.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', resolved_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Issues Completed" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND status_category = 'Done' AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current WIP by Status
panels.description: Issues currently In Progress, grouped by status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT status AS "Status", COUNT(*) AS "Issues", COALESCE(SUM(story_points), 0) AS "Story Points" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND status_category = 'In Progress' GROUP BY status ORDER BY "Issues" DESC

panels.title: Avg Cycle Time (RFT → Done) by Issue Type

targets.rawSql: SELECT issue_type AS "Issue Type", ROUND(AVG(hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Median Hours", COUNT(*) AS "Sample Size" FROM v_cycle_time_rft_to_done WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY issue_type ORDER BY "Avg Hours" DESC

panels.title: Avg Cycle Time (RFT → Done) by Priority

targets.rawSql: SELECT priority AS "Priority", ROUND(AVG(hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Median Hours", COUNT(*) AS "Sample Size" FROM v_cycle_time_rft_to_done WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND priority IS NOT NULL AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY priority ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 WHEN 'Low' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

panels.title: Slowest Issues (RFT → Done)
panels.description: Issues that took the longest to move from Ready For Testing to Done.

targets.rawSql: SELECT issue_key AS "Key", issue_type AS "Type", priority AS "Priority", COALESCE(story_points::text, '-') AS "Points", ROUND(hours_rft_to_done::numeric, 1) AS "Hours (RFT→Done)", TO_CHAR(entered_rft_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Entered RFT", TO_CHAR(resolved_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Resolved" FROM v_cycle_time_rft_to_done WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date ORDER BY hours_rft_to_done DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Cycle Time: In Progress → Ready For Testing (hours)
panels.description: Average, median and 85th percentile of the time issues spend in active development before reaching Ready For Testing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', entered_rft_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(hours_in_progress_to_rft)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_in_progress_to_rft)::numeric, 1) AS "Median", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.85) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_in_progress_to_rft)::numeric, 1) AS "p85" FROM v_cycle_time_in_progress_to_rft WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND $__timeFilter(entered_rft_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Avg Cycle Time (In Progress → RFT) by Issue Type
panels.description: Average development time per issue type. Helps identify which types take longest to develop.

targets.rawSql: SELECT issue_type AS "Issue Type", ROUND(AVG(hours_in_progress_to_rft)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours" FROM v_cycle_time_in_progress_to_rft WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', entered_rft_at) = '$quarter'::date AND hours_in_progress_to_rft > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Avg Cycle Time (In Progress → RFT) by Priority
panels.description: Average development time per priority. High-priority issues should move faster.

targets.rawSql: SELECT priority AS "Priority", ROUND(AVG(hours_in_progress_to_rft)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours" FROM v_cycle_time_in_progress_to_rft WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', entered_rft_at) = '$quarter'::date AND hours_in_progress_to_rft > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 WHEN 'Low' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

panels.title: Slowest Issues (In Progress → RFT)
panels.description: Issues that spent the longest in active development before reaching Ready For Testing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT issue_key AS "Key", issue_type AS "Type", priority AS "Priority", COALESCE(story_points::text, '-') AS "Points", ROUND(hours_in_progress_to_rft::numeric, 1) AS "Hours (IP→RFT)", TO_CHAR(entered_in_progress_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "In Progress", TO_CHAR(entered_rft_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Reached RFT" FROM v_cycle_time_in_progress_to_rft WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND date_trunc('quarter', entered_rft_at) = '$quarter'::date ORDER BY hours_in_progress_to_rft DESC LIMIT 25

list.name: project
list.label: Team / Project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.name: quarter
list.label: Quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC
